title: Re-Crafted 2
description: A Minecraft modpack which completely refreshes the vanilla experience!
body:
## **WARNING: Re-Crafted 2 is discontinued. It's continuation, [Re-Crafted 3](https://modrinth.com/modpack/re-crafted-3), is available here.**

![Re-Crafted 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01f3e3e0edc09bab1e2ccbd9dfd2af826042f978.png)

> **Have you ever wanted Minecraft to feel like a completely new game? Then this modpack is for you! Featuring more than 225 Mods, it completely refreshes the feel of the game with endless content to explore. See more below!**

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b1f540fe1447127b18328a41c36ab9cd8eeebbd.png)

---
![350+ New Biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b9d6c3515eec3970fc66039035e1c691dddd646_0.webp)
Still can't find a biome for your base?

---
![250+ New Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1152063257091105b318961ba2402dbb46d80a17_0.webp)
Always a place for an adventure!

---
![Custom GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f364de4e51d373f432cd769cf14e2cf1f201a761_0.webp)
Animated Backgrounds, Tips, Reorganized Buttons, Beatifully packaged.

---
![Artifacts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8958bd40ec3a23e1ce117aef0def97b7865d552f_0.webp)
Double Jumping, Night Vision, Scaring away Creepers, isn't that nice?

---
![Skill Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2062bd52baa22d04b2532770fcdd31f3404ebc87.png)
Get Stronger, Regenerate Faster, Mine Quicker and more.

---
![Stunning Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/865f8d1943d90b76221b48bbad0948e416ce6a9b_0.webp)
Every view is a scenic one!

---
![And More!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c47095892efe7d1f3d5ad6ddbd0574061b50d2f.png)

# FAQ

**Is the Modpack Beginner Friendly?**

Yes! The modpack doesn't have a steep learning curve, just like like vanilla Minecraft. 

**Is a Powerful Computer Required?**

Depends. If you're planning to run shaders and long render distance then yes, it is 225+ mods after all. The modpack should run fine on slower machines too. **At least 8GB allocated to the game is strongly recommended.**

**Is the Modpack Multiplayer Compatible?**

Yes. Just add all of the mods on the same versions to a Fabric server, and additionally add the required information in the bcc.json config file. Some mods like Hold my Items and Mindful Darkness may cause the server to crash. They are safe to remove, as they run client only.

**Why are some elements still in English after changing the Language?**

The Modpack was written and made entirely in English. As a result, custom or renamed elements are not translated. Translating it would be possible, but would take an incredibly long amount of time.

---
